title: [CR] Python EDHOC: verify_key.verify() uses wrong signature format for nacl
description:
File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py:340-343

After verification: The nacl VerifyKey.verify() API DOES accept (message, signature) as separate parameters:
    verify(smessage, signature=None, ...)
    'If an unsigned message is given for smessage then the detached signature must be provided.'

The code verify_key.verify(m_2, signature_2) is CORRECT.

Closing as non-issue.
